playbook.name: ACE Home Services
playbook.greeting_script: Thank you for calling ACE Home Services, the Greater New Orleans area's trusted home service experts. How can I help you today?
playbook.after_hours_message: You've reached ACE Home Services after business hours. If this is an emergency such as a burst pipe, gas leak, or electrical hazard, please stay on the line and we'll connect you with our on-call technician. For non-emergency requests, we'll schedule you for the next available appointment during business hours.

fee.label: Standard Dispatch Fee
fee.description: Standard dispatch fee during business hours, credited toward the cost of repair.

probing_questions: When did you first notice the issue?
Is this an emergency or safety concern?
Have you tried anything to resolve it?
How old is your AC or heating unit?
Is your system gas or electric?
What brand is your unit?
When was your last maintenance or tune-up?

fee.label: Standard Dispatch Fee
fee.description: Standard dispatch fee during business hours, credited toward the cost of repair.

probing_questions: When did you first notice the issue?
Is this an emergency or safety concern?
Have you tried anything to resolve it?
Are there any exposed wires?
Is the issue in one room or the whole house?
How old is your electrical panel?
dispatch_qualifications: Licensed journeyman or master electrician required
Arc flash PPE required for panel work

non_service_areas.response_script: We currently only service the Greater New Orleans metropolitan area. We're unable to dispatch to Baton Rouge at this time.
We currently only service the Greater New Orleans metropolitan area. We're unable to dispatch to Lafayette at this time.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, checks, and cash. We also offer financing options for larger projects.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a one-year warranty on all labor and honor all manufacturer warranties on parts and equipment we install.

faqs.question: Do you handle emergencies or after-hours calls?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have on-call technicians available 24/7 for emergencies like burst pipes, gas leaks, electrical hazards, and no AC during extreme heat.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We service the entire Greater New Orleans metropolitan area including Metairie, Kenner, the Northshore communities of Mandeville, Covington, and Slidell, as well as the Westbank including Gretna, Harvey, and Marrero.

faqs.question: Are estimates free?
faqs.answer: We provide free estimates for most standard services. Diagnostic fees may apply for complex troubleshooting, but these are credited toward the cost of repair.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, ACE Home Services is fully licensed, bonded, and insured in the state of Louisiana. All of our technicians are certified in their respective trades.

faqs.question: How soon can a technician come out?
faqs.answer: For non-emergency calls during business hours, we can usually get a technician out same-day or next-day. Emergency calls are dispatched immediately.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: We ask for at least 2 hours notice for cancellations. There is no fee for cancellations made with adequate notice.

faqs.question: What should I expect when the technician arrives?
faqs.answer: Our technician will arrive in a marked ACE Home Services vehicle, wearing a company uniform with a photo ID badge. They will walk you through the issue and provide an upfront estimate before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you offer any membership or maintenance plans?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer our Comfort Club membership with three tiers: Single Trade, Complete Home, and Premium. Members enjoy priority scheduling, discounted dispatch fees, annual tune-ups, and savings on repairs.

faqs.question: Is there a fee for a technician to come out?
faqs.answer: Our standard dispatch fee is $89 during business hours and $149 for after-hours and weekend calls. This fee is credited toward the cost of the repair.

faqs.question: What are your business hours?
faqs.answer: Our office is open Monday through Friday, 7 AM to 5 PM. For after-hours emergencies, our on-call technicians are available 24/7.

faqs.question: Do you service all brands?
faqs.answer: Yes, our technicians are trained to service all major brands including Trane, Carrier, Lennox, Rheem, Goodman, and many more.

faqs.question: What areas of New Orleans do you cover?
faqs.answer: We cover the entire Greater New Orleans area including Orleans Parish, Jefferson Parish, St. Tammany Parish, and parts of St. Bernard and Plaquemines Parishes.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options for equipment replacements and larger projects. Ask about our 0% interest plans for qualified customers.

memberships.name: Comfort Club - Single Trade
memberships.description: One annual tune-up for a single system. 10% off repairs for the enrolled trade.

memberships.name: Comfort Club - Complete Home
memberships.description: Annual tune-ups for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical systems. 15% off all repairs. Priority scheduling.

memberships.name: Comfort Club - Premium
memberships.description: All Complete Home benefits plus waived dispatch fees, priority emergency scheduling, and 20% off all repairs.
